_comment: Project-shared MCP servers — committed to git so the whole team gets the same tools. Personal MCP servers (with credentials) go in .claude/settings.local.json.
_notes: XcodeBuildMCP — builds, tests, simulators, screenshots. ~59 tools. Maintained by Sentry. https://github.com/cameroncooke/XcodeBuildMCP
sosumi — Apple developer documentation as Markdown. Proxies via the hosted server at https://sosumi.ai/mcp. Repo: https://github.com/NSHipster/sosumi.ai
Xcode 26.3+ — also add 'xcrun mcpbridge' via `claude mcp add` for native Xcode IDE access including SwiftUI preview rendering.
GitHub MCP — add via the Claude Code settings UI (requires OAuth, not a static config).
